channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI agents that do your work while you sleep sound great. The reality is far messier—‘it’s like a toddler that needs to be overseen’
item.description: Early adopters using tools like OpenClaw and Claude Code say always-on AI is improving—but experts say they are still far from totally hands-off.

item.title: Bitcoin stabilizes after tariff whiplash briefly sends price below $65,000
item.description: The latest volatility for the original cryptocurrency follows the Supreme Court’s landmark decision on Friday.

item.title: The Supreme Court Makes a Prudent Ruling on the Trump Tariffs
item.description: The Court’s decision aligns with the Framers’ views of presidential authority.

item.title: In less than a year, Trump erased 12 years of solvency for the trust fund that pays for Medicare Part A
item.description: The CBO estimates that benefit reductions would start at 8% in 2040 and steadily climb to a 10% cut by 2056.

item.title: Punch The Monkey’s Viral Orphanhood Is The Perfect Reminder That Babies Need Their Moms
item.description: Compassion for Punch the monkey’s viral orphanhood should extend to babies deprived of their mothers via third-party reproduction.

item.title: Trump addresses dead Mar-a-Lago intruder: 'I want to be a little less consequential'
item.description: President Trump said Monday that people are "gunning for me" in the wake of an armed intruder being shot to death by Secret Service and a sheriff's de...

item.title: Blue State Justice: Lawfare-Plagued Trump Lawyer Asks Judge Who Smeared Him As Racist To Recuse
item.description: Dragged through the Democrats' endless lawfare campaign, Jim Troupis is asking the liberal-led state Supreme Court to consider due process.

item.title: Gen Z, desperate to get off their phones, is powering a sewing renaissance
item.description: Other traditional textile art like crocheting, knitting, and embroidery have popped off among Gen Zers.

item.title: Supreme Court says it will take up climate change law challenge out of Colorado
item.description: The Supreme Court announced Monday it will hear a dispute brought by Colorado communities against oil companies over actions the localities say have c...

item.title: Chloe Cole Act aimed at blocking minors from undergoing life-altering transgender surgeries, GOP lawmaker says
item.description: Republican lawmaker introduces federal legislation named after detransitioner Chloe Cole that would block gender-related medical procedures for minors...

item.title: SCOTUS Takes Up Oil Companies’ Challenge To Colorado City’s Climate Lawfare
item.description: Boulder officials claimed that these oil companies' 'fossil fuel activities contributed to climate change, causing harm to Boulder’s property and resi...

item.title: Groups tell lawmakers the Center for Medicare and Medicaid Innovation is wasteful
item.description: A coalition of more than 40 organizations is calling for the elimination of the Center for Medicare and Medicaid Innovation, calling the center a "fai...

item.title: An ‘Acceptable War’
item.description: Why does the MAGA base now seem to approve of an approach to war they supposedly sought to reject?

item.title: Rubio heads to Caribbean to reassert U.S. interests after Venezuela strikes and Iran threats
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio will travel to the Caribbean country of St. Kitts and Nevis this week to reassert the Trump administration's interests ...

item.title: Corporate Media Downplay Another Apparent Assassination Attempt Against Trump
item.description: Once political violence stops shocking the public, it starts to become normalized, even almost expected.

item.title: We Need a Vote on Iran
item.description: A decision as consequential as this one deserves a real debate in Congress.

item.title: Trump’s ‘total elimination’ strategy paved way for fall of cartel kingpin ‘El Mencho’
item.description: Documents reveal the fall of “El Mencho" was the culmination of an aggressive “total elimination" strategy pursued by the U.S. against the Jalisco New...

item.title: Report: Woke School ‘Segregated’ Middle Schoolers By Race Without Parents’ Knowledge
item.description: FOIA results exposed a middle school allegedly hosting 'student equity assemblies' in which students were 'segregated' according to race, according to...

item.title: Angel Families praise Trump for immigration crackdown: 'You are the man'
item.description: People who suffered the loss of a family member slain by illegal immigrants thanked President Trump as his administration seeks to tackle illegal immi...

item.title: Georgia lawmaker calls for ICE surge after Savannah teacher allegedly killed by illegal immigrant
item.description: A Georgia congressman is urging a surge of ICE agents after a Savannah teacher was killed by an illegal immigrant fleeing a federal traffic stop.

item.title: States Should Put Workers First with Private Sector Labor Reforms
item.description: It’s no accident that right-to-work states have the highest net domestic population growth.

item.title: Trump halts Angel Families speech to check on woman in audience
item.description: President Donald Trump paused his Angel families ceremony to speak with Patty Morin about her health and eye surgery, as he honored victims of crimes ...

item.title: Trump honors 'angel families' of those slain by illegal immigrants
item.description: President Trump on Monday honored the families of victims of crimes committed by illegal immigrants in a White House ceremony where he signed a procla...

item.title: ‘Maya MacGuineas should be ashamed’: Scott Bessent launches war of words with the nonpartisan think tank that agrees with Trump on tariffs
item.description: For her part, MacGuineas said Bessent’s diatribe was “a bit of an odd response.”

item.title: Would You Believe That Democrats Were Not Anti-Israel Enough in 2024?
item.description: Even left-of-center analysts have thrown cold water on the far left’s self-flattering narratives.

item.title: Building Commitment to Long-Term Investing
item.description: Why clients stall on long-term investing and how reframing commitment around flexibility unlocks forward momentum. The post Building Commitment to Lon...

item.title: Why Static Portfolios Fail When Risk Regimes Change
item.description: Why static portfolio frameworks fail when risk regimes shift, drawing lessons from the very different market breakdowns of 2020 and 2022. The post Why...

item.title: What the Market Knows That WACC Doesn’t
item.description: Market-implied discount rates reveal how investors price risk, often diverging from WACC and reshaping capital decisions. The post What the Market Kno...

item.title: Attention Bias in AI-Driven Investing
item.description: AI tools may favor popular stocks over overlooked ones, embedding attention bias into investment decisions. The post Attention Bias in AI-Driven Inves...

item.title: Social Security Claiming Strategies for High-Net-Worth Clients
item.description: Social Security claiming is a capital-allocation decision for affluent clients. This analysis weighs taxes, longevity risk, and liquidity trade-offs. ...
